metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1613
metadata.comment: Rationale: In this paper endogenous Septin 8 is labelled. The authors find colocalisation with presynaptic markers Synaptophysin (Fig6c) and VAMP2 (Fig8b), but also observe that Septin8 label is present in the soma region. No colocalization is quantified. Fig6d shows two examples of immunoEM against Septin8, in which the presynapse is clearly darker compared to the postsynapse. The predominant presynaptic location is further verified by subcellular fractionation, where septin 8 is most enriched in the vesicular fraction (LP2). However, all these data are not supported by quantification.. Experimental description: Figure legend: "Sept8 localizes at synapses of rat neurons."
